user.title: Wiren Board
user.description: Connect to the Wiren Board MQTT broker.

pick_controls.title: Discovered items
pick_controls.description: Select Wiren Board items to add to Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Wiren Board MQTT broker.
error.no_devices_found: No devices found. Check MQTT and the topic prefix.

abort.cannot_connect: The controller was found through Zeroconf, but MQTT did not respond.
abort.not_wirenboard: The discovered Zeroconf device does not look like a Wiren Board controller.

invert_binary_sensors.title: Binary sensor inversion
invert_binary_sensors.description: Select binary sensors whose on and off states should be reversed.

configure_meters.title: Gas and water meters
configure_meters.description: Assign a type to volume sensors. A sensor cannot be both a gas and water meter.

remove_entities.title: Remove unwanted entities
remove_entities.description: Permanently remove standalone entities and their empty devices. Entities used by groups are not shown here.

controls.title: Wiren Board items
controls.description: Select Wiren Board items to add to Home Assistant as entities.

connection.title: Wiren Board connection
connection.description: Change MQTT connection settings. The integration will reload after saving.

add_group.title: Home Assistant device group
add_group.description: Create a logical Home Assistant device from items that belong to different Wiren Board devices. Reuse an existing ID to update that group.

add_group_roles.title: Item roles
add_group_roles.description: Select only the roles needed by the composite entity. Items in "Expose as separate entities" will also appear as regular sensor/binary_sensor/button/number entities.

edit_group.title: Edit group
edit_group.description: Choose the group you want to edit.

edit_group_details.title: Group contents
edit_group_details.description: Change the Home Assistant device name and contents. Items that already belong to another group are marked with that group name in square brackets.

edit_group_roles.title: Item roles
edit_group_roles.description: Select only the roles needed by the composite entity. Items in "Expose as separate entities" will also appear as regular sensor/binary_sensor/button/number entities.

remove_group.title: Remove group
remove_group.description: Remove a grouping. Entities will stay selected and return to their original Wiren Board devices.

export_config.title: Export configuration
export_config.description: Copy the JSON below. It contains connection settings, selected items, groups, roles, and stored item metadata.

import_config.title: Import configuration
import_config.description: Paste JSON created by the export screen. The integration will reload after saving.

diagnostics.title: Wiren Board diagnostics

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Wiren Board MQTT broker.
error.meter_type_overlap: The same sensor is selected as both gas and water.
error.already_exists: A group with this ID already exists.
error.no_groups: No groups have been created yet.
